body.title: Replace hardcoded Igor-wild-0001 defaults in cluster_ssh.py
body.result: Fixed remaining 4 hardcoded Igor-wild-0001 refs: stripped from word_graph.py + consolidation.py docstrings, replaced with dynamic path in worker_foreman.py user msg, exempted config.py (defining source). Audit check now clean.
body.description:
audit_runner no-hardcoded-instance-refs flags 4 refs in cluster_ssh.py. Specifically _DEFAULT_USER = 'Igor-wild-0001' (line 31) and os.getenv('WINDOWS_USER_IGOR_USER', 'Igor-wild-0001') (line 330) should read from paths().instance_id rather than literal strings so they work correctly when the instance name changes.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/cluster_ssh.py (lines 31, 330 and related docstrings)
**Design rules:** no-hardcoded-instance-refs audit check; use paths() per palace rule
**Scope boundary:** IN: replacing literal 'Igor-wild-0001' defaults with paths().instance_id. OUT: cluster SSH functionality changes.
**Test plan:** Verify existing cluster_ssh tests pass. Spot-check that _DEFAULT_USER resolves correctly.
